classification.why_board_blocking: The failed FL3 law/meta evaluator checks sit on the authoritative execution board, so they blocked Wave 3 entry even though C017 itself was already closed.

exact_failures.summary: fl3_meta_evaluator failed closed because no kt.law_amendment.v2 existed for the current LAW_BUNDLE hash.
LAW_BUNDLE_FL3.sha256 was still pinned to the pre-C017 bundle hash instead of the current computed bundle hash.

fix.bundle_delta_truth: The law bundle changed because KT_PROD_CLEANROOM/04_PROD_TEMPLE_V2/src/schemas/runtime_context_schema.py changed under C017 remediation.
fix.minimality_rule: Refresh the stale FL3 law-chain surfaces only: sync the pinned LAW_BUNDLE hash, mint a matching HMAC amendment for that exact bundle hash, and append one change receipt from HEAD to the current worktree.

scope_boundary: FL3_LAW_META_EVALUATOR_REMEDIATION_ONLY. No Wave 3 execution, no router promotion, no organ widening, no verifier widening, no product widening, no externality widening.

wave3_readiness.reason: The board is clean on the scoped rerun, C017 remains closed, and the FL3 law/meta evaluator red checks are repaired. Wave 3 may open only if explicitly approved.
